refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual productivity (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the customer-defined target; verify sub-FRs by assessing equipment operation efficiency and task execution metrics.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Dynamic task scheduling and dispatch system.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and productivity reporting subsystem.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling
Data dependencies between telemetry and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with DP2 and DP3 to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for control algorithms.
Risk of performance degradation if control algorithms are not well integrated with task scheduling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control and scheduling to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives scheduled tasks and commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of control algorithms within Vehicle; low diffusion as control logic is centralized.
Limited containment; control logic spread would increase diffusion risk.
Minimal containment; control algorithms not suitable here.
No containment; unrelated to control algorithms.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Control algorithms for equipment operation are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry.
Risk of overloading Vehicle module with software complexity.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and consider splitting control logic if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by providing adaptive control to maximize throughput.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if control algorithms are partially implemented outside Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Vehicle is strong, minimizing diffusion risks.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and validating control performance within Vehicle.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface specifications between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry.
Monitor software complexity within Vehicle to avoid module overload.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Accurate sensor data is available for control algorithms.
Interfaces between modules will be clearly defined and maintained.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Potential software complexity within Vehicle module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype control algorithms.
